name: impersonated-fetch
description: Node.js fetch port scaffold for requests_go impersonation backend

scripts.package:check: npm run build && vitest run test/package/package-check.test.mjs
scripts.native-assets:check: npm run build && vitest run test/package/package-check.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && vitest run test/client/client-session.test.ts test/errors/errors-abort.test.ts test/fetch/facade.test.ts test/fingerprint/fixture.test.ts test/impersonation/serialize.test.ts test/impersonation/types.test.ts test/native/abi.test.ts test/native/assets.test.ts test/native/transport.test.ts test/transport/capabilities.test.ts
scripts.test:watch: vitest test/client/client-session.test.ts test/errors/errors-abort.test.ts test/fetch/facade.test.ts test/fingerprint/fixture.test.ts test/impersonation/serialize.test.ts test/impersonation/types.test.ts test/native/abi.test.ts test/native/assets.test.ts test/native/transport.test.ts test/transport/capabilities.test.ts
scripts.test:fingerprint: npm run build && vitest run test/fingerprint/smoke.test.ts -t fingerprint-smoke
scripts.test:package: npm run build && vitest run test/package/package-check.test.mjs
